base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of koopa_paratroopa_flap — a character from 1985 super mario bros. wings down / wings up. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 2-frame wing-flap cycle — wings down / wings up; flies in fixed arc or hovers pattern
